title: Alien Smoking a Joint Ashtray | Characteristic Alien Figurine | Novelty Green Alien Ashtray | Smokers Gift Idea
features: Super Cool - This humourous novelty ashtray with a green smoking alien is certainly an eye-catcher. It features a mystical sci-fi coloured theme finished with a comical alien character smoking a reefer.
Artistic Craftsmanship - cast from polyresin and hand-painted with a lot of imagination and attention to detail, each ashtray is unique and a small work of art in itself.
Practical and Stylish - large enough for your smoking pleasure and small enough to find its perfect place anywhere.
The Perfect Gift - an unforgettable gift for all Sci-Fi & Fantasy fans, for a housewarming party, birthday or just because.
Approximate Dimensions: Size: 15 x 14.8 x 11.6 cm. Material: Polyresin. Weight: 260g.
